creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
When tryng to upgrade amavisd-new portupgrade fails to identify already installed db42:

# portupgrade amavisd-new
--->  Updating the pkgdb
--->  Checking the package registry database
Missing origin: bsdpan-SNMP-Extension-PassPersist-0.03
-> Ignored. (the package is held; specify -f to force)
** Port marked as IGNORE: java/jdk16:
        is marked as broken: does not compile
--->  Skipping 'bsdpan-SNMP-Extension-PassPersist-0.03' because it is held by user (specify -f to force)
--->  Upgrading 'amavisd-new-2.6.4_5,1' to 'amavisd-new-2.6.4_6,1' (security/amavisd-new)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/security/amavisd-new' with make flags: -DWITH_BDB -DWITH_SNMP -DWITH_POF -DWITH_RAR -DWITH_UNRAR -DWITH_UNARJ -DWITH_NOMARCH -DWITH_UNZOO -DWITH_TNEF BATCH=YES

===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
